data.body: Build reusable layout primitives: PageSection, ContentContainer, PageHeader. Refine Header/Footer typography to match brand guide. Customize @tailwindcss/typography for brand (serif body, sans headings, mono code, terracotta links). Background treatment system for section alternation and texture layering. Key refs: research/01 (Asimov spacing), brand-guide §4, research/03 §2.
